content:
Hello Community:
I am looking for community members who work as data curators/repository managers to serve on a curation panel during the community meeting.

Please contact me if you plan to attend the community meeting so we can discuss -

Thanks
Sonia

Sonia Barbosa said:

Hello Community:
I am looking for community members who work as data curators/repository managers to serve on a curation panel during the community meeting.

Please contact me if you plan to attend the community meeting so we can discuss -

Thanks
Sonia

Hello Sonia,

I would be happy to help out on a panel on curation if it is still needed. Please send over any information you have about the panel that you would like me to work on.

Thanks for sharing this opportunity!
